meta.title: AI SDK Extension Refactoring — Execution State Machine
meta.scope: Phase execution sequencing + WebSocket transport state + per-request transport decision

grafcets.name: Phase Execution Sequence
grafcets.description: Top-level execution order with dependencies and stop gates

steps.name: Provider Options Active
actions: A11: store=false + serviceTier=priority injected in transform.ts
A12: promptCacheKey migrated to providerOptions (interceptor fallback retained)
Verify: AI SDK adapter auto-includes reasoning.encrypted_content

steps.name: Encrypted Reasoning Verified
actions: A13: Verify session history preserves encrypted_content
Verify: reasoning items replayed in next turn input
Fix if needed: history serialization path

steps.name: Dead Code Removed
actions: A51: Remove CUSTOM_LOADER branch in provider.ts
A53: Move codexTurnState to per-session storage

steps.name: WebSocket Manager Ready
actions: A31: WS connection manager built (per-session lifecycle)

steps.name: WebSocket Transport Adapter Active
actions: A32: WS events → SSE stream transform operational
Verify: AI SDK SSE parser consumes synthetic Response

steps.name: Server Compaction Integrated
actions: A4: Fallback to client-side compaction verified

transitions.condition: Plan approved AND llm.ts call path understood
store=false active AND AI SDK auto-include verified in request
encrypted_content round-trip verified (request → response → history → next request)
Fetch interceptor tests pass AND no duplication remains
Dead code removed AND typecheck clean AND all tests pass
transitions.note: SG-4 gate: if removing dead code breaks anything, fix before proceeding

transitions.condition: WS connection established to codex endpoint AND handshake accepted
transitions.stop_gate: SG-2: If WS handshake rejected → stay at S4 (HTTP-only mode), skip to S7

transitions.condition: WS transport adapter verified: AI SDK parses synthetic Response AND delta saves >50% tokens
SG-2 triggered: WS handshake rejected → skip WS phases
Server compaction reduces context >50% OR gracefully degrades (404 fallback)

grafcets.name: WebSocket Connection State Machine
grafcets.description: Per-session WebSocket lifecycle within fetch interceptor

steps.name: Streaming
actions: One request at a time (no multiplexing)

transitions.condition: First codex fetch intercepted AND wsEnabled = true
WebSocket 'open' event received
Handshake timeout OR 'error' event OR HTTP 426 upgrade rejected
fetch() called AND request body dispatched via WS
response.completed received → stream closed → WS ready for next request
WS error during streaming OR unexpected close
WS unexpected close while idle

grafcets.name: Per-Request Transport Decision
grafcets.description: How each fetch interceptor call decides HTTP vs WebSocket + full vs delta

steps.name: Request Intercepted
actions: Read wsEnabled flag, WS connection state

steps.name: Delta Request Dispatched
actions: Create SSE ReadableStream from WS events

steps.name: Full Request Via WebSocket
actions: Create SSE ReadableStream from WS events

steps.name: HTTP Path Selected
actions: Apply existing body transforms (auth, URL rewrite, headers)

steps.name: Response Delivered
actions: Capture turn state from response headers

transitions.condition: isCodexEndpoint AND wsEnabled AND ws.readyState === OPEN
NOT isCodexEndpoint OR NOT wsEnabled OR ws not OPEN
body.previous_response_id present AND instructions+tools unchanged
No previous_response_id OR instructions/tools changed
SSE stream completed successfully
SSE stream completed successfully
HTTP response received
WS error during delta streaming → retry same request via HTTP
WS error during full streaming → retry same request via HTTP
